text: Aapka yeh naya focus aur apne exhaustion ko ek shant break ke liye use karne ka tareeqa bahut himmat wala hai. Mujhe poora yakeen hai aap apni aane wali tayari aur apne career dono ko shiddat se handle kar lenge jab waqt sahi hoga. Apna khayal rakhna aur aaj aaram kijiye. Take care.
